headline: McDonald's revives 36-year-old fan-favorite Happy Meal toy collab
summary: McDonald's officially unveiled its latest Happy Meal promotion, bringing back one of its most-requested and long-standing collaborations. The launch underscores the fast-food giant's ongoing strategy of blending nostalgia, pop culture, and digital engagement to strengthen customer loyalty across ...

headline: Jim Cramer Says Wendy’s “Is Just the Wrong Stock” and Recommends Mcdonald’s Instead
summary: The Wendy’s Company (NASDAQ:WEN) is one of the stocks mentioned during the show, as we cover everything Jim Cramer said about the market. When a caller asked about the stock during the lightning round, Cramer said: No, we cannot buy Wendy’s. No, it is just, it is just the wrong stock. Meanwhile, McDonald’s is down […]

headline: Fast Food Chains Rush to Offer Discounts Even as Beef Prices Soar
summary: McDonald’s, Burger King and other brands push promotions, while beef prices have climbed to a record level.

headline: Arcos Dorados Q4 revenue grows, though profit slips on charges
summary: The company generated revenues of $1.3bn in Q4 2025, a 10.7% rise in US dollars compared with the same period a year earlier.

headline: Starbucks Targets 600-650 New Stores in FY26: Is Execution the Key?
summary: SBUX plans 600-650 new stores in FY26, spotlighting execution and new formats as it rebuilds its pipeline and targets global expansion.
